creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Outputs from diagnostic commands @ NetBSD (FreeBSD put [[[[[[[ chars on the screen ...)

Problem occurs on TOSHIBA Satellite A75 and other workstation also.

For example, after boot, if you wpould like to type root as login, you would end up with something like that:

login : ]]]]]]r]]]]]]]]]]o]]]o]]]]]t]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]]
